arts.ttl: The Verdict: Everton and Moyes must bring in January signings to help attack
arts.sum: Sky Sports News' Ben Ransom and Tony Scott from The All Together Now podcast break down Everton's 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa in David Moyes' first game back at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: David Moyes: I can’t magic an end to Everton’s goalscoring woes
arts.sum: Everton suffered a 1-0 home defeat to Aston Villa in David Moyes’ first game back as manager.

arts.ttl: 'A huge challenge' - Moyes warns he can't be Everton's 'magician'
arts.sum: David Moyes said he did not want to be "at the bottom of the league and fighting relegation" - but has signed up for exactly that with Everton.

arts.ttl: Watkins spoils Moyes’ return as Villa edge past Everton
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins’ second-half strike ensured David Moyes’ second stint in charge of Everton began with a 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa. Villa carried the greater attacking threat early on as Jordan Pickford pushed away Rogers' curling effort and James Tarkowski's strong block thwarted Youri Tielemans before a loose pass from Ashley Young released Watkins, who shot wide with only the goalkeeper to beat.

arts.ttl: Ipswich sign winger Philogene from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Ipswich Town have completed the signing of winger Jaden Philogene from Aston Villa on a four-and-a-half-year deal. During his time at Hull, Philogene scored 12 goals and registered 6 assists in 32 appearances including an incredible Rabona finish that was later nominated for a Puskas Award.

arts.ttl: Ipswich sign winger Philogene from Aston Villa
arts.sum: Ipswich complete the signing of winger Jaden Philogene from Aston Villa for a fee in the region of £20m.

arts.ttl: Everton's Broja out for up to 12 weeks with injury
arts.sum: Everton striker Armando Broja will be sidelined for up to three months with an ankle ligament injury, says manager David Moyes.

arts.ttl: Return to Everton an 'absolute whirlwind' - Moyes
arts.sum: Everton head coach David Moyes says his return to Goodison Park has been a "whirlwind" as he suffers a 0-1 defeat against Aston Villa in his first game back in charge.

arts.ttl: Hits and misses: Moyes must find way to solve Ndiaye puzzle at Everton
arts.sum: The problem emerging, however, in this wretched run of five goals in 11 league games - nine of which Everton haven't scored in - is that Ndiaye has looked like he's been operating in a parallel universe to his team-mates. No player made more tackles for Arsenal (4), won possession more times (6) and had a higher passing accuracy (93.8 per cent) than Lewis-Skelly as the statistics backed up the visuals.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa complete £20m January transfer after Unai Emery decision
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Emery admitted that a loan move was one option for Philogene, since he believes in his potential, but the club was happy to accept the offer which Ipswich presented. Villa held a ‘matching rights’ option and triggered that clause when Ipswich Town saw an £18m bid accepted in July.
